test_cases.test:
corpus = """<s> I am Jack </s> <s> Jack I am </s> <s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s> <s> do I like Jack </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "Jack"),4))

corpus = """<s> I am Jack </s> <s> Jack I am </s> <s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s> <s> do I like Jack </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "like"),4))

example.input: corpus = "<s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s>", word = "Jack"
example.reasoning: The corpus has 11 total tokens. 'Jack' appears twice. So, probability = 2 / 11

title: Calculate Unigram Probability from Corpus

pytorch_test_cases.test:
import torch
corpus = """<s> I am Jack </s> <s> Jack I am </s> <s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s> <s> do I like Jack </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "Jack").item(), 4))

import torch
corpus = """<s> I am Jack </s> <s> Jack I am </s> <s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s> <s> do I like Jack </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "like").item(), 4))

import torch
corpus = """<s> hello world </s> <s> hello </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "hello").item(), 4))

import torch
corpus = """<s> the quick brown fox </s> <s> jumps over the lazy dog </s>"""
print(round(unigram_probability(corpus, "the").item(), 4))

from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
corpus = """<s> I am Jack </s> <s> Jack I am </s> <s> Jack I like </s> <s> Jack I do like </s> <s> do I like Jack </s>"""
result = unigram_probability(corpus, "Jack")
print(round(result.item(), 4))
